title: Thermostat heats to the setpoint
description: From a cold 20 °C start, ask for 24 °C and step the virtual clock: the controller engages (Status → Heating), the room warms past 22 °C, and the energy meter accumulates. Runs deterministically under `dale dev --stepped`. Targets the default topology.

steps.label: One control tick — the thermostat engages
Warm the room for 25 s of virtual time
…but is still short of the 24 °C setpoint (no overshoot)
The energy meter accumulated while heating

judge.text: The Status pill shows Heating while warming, then settles on Idle near the setpoint
CurrentTemperature reaches ~24 °C without a large overshoot
